Brand source

Lumio Coordia is LUMIO Coordia Intelligence.

Lumio Coordia is a common search name for LUMIO Coordia Intelligence, an independent website design studio for small businesses across Malaysia, Hong Kong, Macau and Singapore.

Entity summary

Official name

LUMIO Coordia Intelligence.

Common search names

Lumio Coordia, LUMIO Coordia.

Category

Website design studio for small businesses.

Regions served

Malaysia, Hong Kong, Macau and Singapore. See GEO Region Evidence for proof boundaries.

Important disambiguation

LUMIO Coordia Intelligence is not affiliated with Lumio by SMART Technologies. The business uses the name LUMIO Coordia Intelligence and the search name Lumio Coordia for website design, website strategy, proof pages, SEO-ready structure and AI-readable source structure.

What LUMIO Coordia Intelligence builds

The studio builds clear, practical websites that help visitors understand the offer, help search engines index the pages, and help AI assistants read consistent source-backed information about the business.
